response.justification: The candidate is an experienced generalist with strong web, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang credentials, but does not meet the role's core requirements: professional C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) rather than the required 5-10 years on Windows, there is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only), and there is no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain background — RIDE Capital was a retail investment product, not investment banking. The gap on all mandatory criteria makes this a poor fit despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Experience building low-latency, high-throughput systems (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Broad polyglot background with CI/CD, Docker, and scripting proficiency
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far short of the required 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets/investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Solid general engineering and CI/CD fundamentals
